mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (email, password, nickname, birth_year, mbti, chronotype, main_stat) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{birthYear}, #{mbti}, #{chronotype}, #{mainStat})
mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, email, password, nickname, birth_year AS birthYear, mbti, chronotype, total_point AS totalPoint, main_stat AS mainStat, profile_image AS profileImage, likes, dislikes, goal, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, nickname_change_count AS nicknameChangeCount, daily_point AS dailyPoint FROM users WHERE email = #{email}

SELECT user_id AS userId, email, password, nickname, birth_year AS birthYear, mbti, chronotype, total_point AS totalPoint, main_stat AS mainStat, profile_image AS profileImage, likes, dislikes, goal, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, nickname_change_count AS nicknameChangeCount, daily_point AS dailyPoint FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_point DESC) AS `rank`, user_id AS userId, nickname, total_point AS totalPoint, (YEAR(CURDATE()) - birth_year) AS mainLevel
FROM users ORDER BY total_point DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT `rank`, userId, nickname, totalPoint, mainLevel FROM ( SELECT RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_point DESC) AS `rank`, user_id AS userId, nickname, total_point AS totalPoint, (YEAR(CURDATE()) - birth_year) AS mainLevel FROM users ) ranked WHERE userId = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname}, mbti = #{mbti}, chronotype = #{chronotype}, main_stat = #{mainStat}, likes = #{likes}, dislikes = #{dislikes}, goal = #{goal}, profile_image = #{profileImage}, nickname_change_count = #{nicknameChangeCount} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET nickname_change_count = nickname_change_count - 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND nickname_change_count > 0
